gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: Aeronautical Information Service Center of Air Traffic Management Bureau, Civil Aviation Administration of China

gmd:deliveryPoint.gco:CharacterString: No.9 Xiedao West Road, Chaoyang District Beijing 100018, People's Republic of China

gmd:abstract.gco:CharacterString: The aeronautical data for People's Republic of China are collected and published according to ICAO Annex 15, 16th Edition requirements. Refer to the DPS document for detail information.

gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: Aeronautical Information Service Center of Air Traffic Management Bureau, Civil Aviation Administration of China

gmd:deliveryPoint.gco:CharacterString: No.9 Xiedao West Road, Chaoyang District Beijing 100018, People's Republic of China

gmd:useLimitation.gco:CharacterString: For evaluation and testing use only; not for operational purposes.
